message:
feat(cli): unify output format handling with --format flag across all commands

Replace ad-hoc --json flags with comprehensive --format flag
supporting table, json, and toon output formats across ~20 CLI
commands spanning SetupCommand, ArchiveCommand, MailCommand,
ProductsCommand, DoctorCommand, MacroCommand, and ToolingCommand
enums. Default is auto-detect based on terminal context.

Also pin asupersync dependency to version 0.2.0 alongside its
local path reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
